title: Notifications  - Update failed
scenario: User taps the "Device didn't update" notification after a DFU failure and is redirected to the Software update failure screen.
steps: Initiate a device firmware update (DFU) on a Poly device.
Interrupt the update process (e.g., turn off the device) to cause a failure.
Observe the notification that appears on the user's device.
expected: A notification "Device didn't update" appears. Tapping it redirects the user to the Software update failure screen in the Poly Lens application.
